description: A boat tour has been cancelled by the operator due to bad weather. The agent must inform booked customers and process refunds.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all customers booked on the cancelled tour.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retrieves a list of affected customers.

nodes.task_description: Send a notification (SMS or email) to all affected customers informing them of the cancellation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends out the cancellation alerts.

nodes.task_description: Process a full refund for all bookings for the cancelled tour.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully initiates refunds for all affected customers.
